name: example-private-agent-pack
description: Private agent pack template with explicit data-flow contracts.

inputs.name: source_material
inputs.description: Private source notes, repo files, or operational context the pack may read.

outputs.name: agent_response
outputs.description: User-facing answer or implementation summary produced by the agent.

outputs.name: private_working_notes
outputs.description: Intermediate notes that may reference private source material.

outputs.name: secret_adjacency_report
outputs.description: Findings that describe secret locations, credential stores, or access boundaries without exposing values.
